data.title: Modify SKILL.md to route by config key instead of caller context
data.description:
1. Add APPROACH_RESOLUTION read to Config Resolution section alongside TEST_CMD/LINT_CMD
2. Replace "Handling sprint vs standalone context" (lines 370-375) with config-based routing
3. Replace Accept Path branching (lines 420-421): autonomous -> proceed; interactive -> present to user
4. Escalate Path (line 446): PRESERVED in both modes — always escalate to user after 2 cycles
5. Replace Sprint vs Standalone Context summary (lines 451-452) with autonomous/interactive
6. Remove "Context detection" paragraph (line 375) — config key is sole routing signal
Remove RED marker from .test-index. Eval cases from Task 2 now pass (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] run-skill-evals.sh passes
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] No sprint/standalone context in approach resolution sections
  Verify: ! grep -in 'sprint context\|standalone context' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -i 'approach\|proposal\|resolution\|decision.maker' | grep -q .
- [ ] Config Resolution reads APPROACH_RESOLUTION
  Verify: grep -q 'implementation_plan.approach_resolution' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Escalation escape hatch preserved
  Verify: grep -q 'escalat.*user\|user.*escalat' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] No stale cross-references in other files
  Verify: ! grep -rn 'sprint.*context.*approach\|standalone.*context.*approach' plugins/dso/skills/ plugins/dso/agents/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'implementation-plan/SKILL.md' | grep -q .
- [ ] Fallback to autonomous when key absent
  Verify: grep -q 'APPROACH_RESOLUTION.*autonomous' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
